description: Generate videos using Alibaba Wanx AI models with 4 modes: text-to-video, image-to-video, keyframe-to-video, and reference-to-video
text2video-description: Generate video from text description using Wanx AI
image2video-description: Generate video from first frame image using Wanx AI
keyframe2video-description: Generate transition video from first and last frame images using Wanx AI
reference2video-description: Generate video from reference materials using Wanx AI
wanx-t2v-video-api-description: Generate video from text description using Wanx AI
wanx-t2v-video-api-prompt: Text prompt describing the video content
wanx-t2v-video-api-negative-prompt: Negative prompt describing what should not appear
wanx-i2v-video-api-description: Generate video from first frame image using Wanx AI
wanx-i2v-video-api-image-url: First frame image URL or Base64
wanx-i2v-video-api-prompt: Text prompt describing the video content
wanx-i2v-video-api-model: Model variant: flash for speed, standard for quality
wanx-i2v-video-api-negative-prompt: Negative prompt describing what should not appear
wanx-kf2v-video-api-description: Generate transition video from first and last frame images using Wanx AI
wanx-kf2v-video-api-prompt: Text prompt describing the video transition
wanx-kf2v-video-api-model: Model variant: flash for speed, plus for quality
wanx-kf2v-video-api-last-frame-url: Last frame image URL for transition
wanx-kf2v-video-api-negative-prompt: Negative prompt describing what should not appear
wanx-r2v-video-api-description: Generate video from reference materials using Wanx AI
wanx-r2v-video-api-prompt: Text prompt using character1, character2 to reference materials
wanx-r2v-video-api-reference-urls: Reference image or video URLs (1-5 items)
wanx-r2v-video-api-model: Model variant: flash for speed, standard for quality
wanx-r2v-video-api-negative-prompt: Negative prompt describing what should not appear
